title: WALK-IN YOUTH CLINIC - 211info
text: NEIGHBORHOOD HEALTH CENTER HILLSBORO REPRODUCTIVE/SEXUAL HEALTH CLINIC WALK-IN YOUTH CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Walk-in reproductive health clinic for youth. Services include STD/STI screening and treatment (including HIV testing), contraception, pregnancy testing, and gynecological exams. 266 W Main Street Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Age 24 and younger Hours: Tuesday 4pm-7pm (503) 941-3016 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 941-3016 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: Accepts OHP (Health Share, FamilyCare, and Open Card), Medicare, and most private insurances. Sliding scale fee available. No one is turned away due to inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. If applying for sliding scale fees, bring one of the following: last two pay stubs, previous year's tax return, or unemployment statement. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, and other interpretations by arrangement AREA SERVED: Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on Max Blue Line, TriMet bus lines 46 and 57. Services: Contraception Emergency Contraception HIV Testing Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEIGHBORHOOD HEALTH CENTER HILLSBORO REPRODUCTIVE/SEXUAL HEALTH CLINIC
